E1287.conclusion: Smoke-only evidence was not representative: E1288 is structurally invalid decode-off and E1289 regresses to an empty timeout decode-on. Reject E1287 and close the scalar root-identity decode sweep.

E1288.conclusion: Smoke is not representative. The same-checkpoint decode-on pair is required before attributing the failure to root-reference identity ranking.

E1289.conclusion: Relative to E1288, enabling root-reference identity decode worsens the same checkpoint and Settings record from structurally invalid output to empty timeout. Reject E1287 and close this scalar decode sweep.

decode_stats.finding: one forward binder reference then an inline Slider continuation exhausted the legal frontier budget

E1290.conclusion: Evaluator v58 preserves timeout telemetry. The legal frontier is not dead; do not reopen the scalar root-identity sweep.

E1291.conclusion: Full document targets correct the scope-target mismatch without changing admission gates.

E1292.conclusion: The data-only control removes all held-out timeouts and improves structure, but strict-v2 remains zero on every row because required slots are not realized in schema-compatible roles. Reject E1292; do not reopen scalar slot-margin or root-identity sweeps.

E1293.conclusion: Root-only close blocking forces a constrained dead end and reverts through retry to the E1288-style trivial program. Reject; no wider suite.

E1294.conclusion: Increasing fidelity loss from 0.5 to 1.0 regresses the final Settings probe to an empty timeout. Reject E1294 without a wider suite and close this scalar fidelity lever for E1291.

E1081.comparison_to_E1078: Decode-off removes the earlier E1078 empty timeout, but this is a fresh checkpoint under a later dirty code state and is not yet a causal attribution or quality improvement.
E1081.next_action: E1082 completed the paired identity-decode-on replay against the same checkpoint.

E1082.comparison_to_E1081: All reported named domain metrics are identical despite active identity applications and seven changed choices. The component version stamps match; the code commit drifted during concurrent work and is disclosed below.
E1082.conclusion: Identity decode is not a sufficient explanation for E1078's earlier Settings timeout. E1080 is strict-invalid at both weights and is rejected as a scratch checkpoint.

disposition.next_hypothesis: Move from scalar root-list ranking to a different structural representation or deterministic completion constraint; do not promote or parent E1075/E1080/E1287.
